name: secure-ml-training-pipeline
description: Draft plan for a secure ML training pipeline: ADLSv2 for data, Azure ML for training, audit logging for all jobs, outputs encrypted using customer-managed keys (CMK). Assume defaults for SKUs, regions, and names.

security.dataAtRest: Storage encryption with CMK from KeyVault (recommended)
security.identity: User-assigned managed identities for compute and services
security.rbac: Least-privilege roles for storage and ML workspace
security.network: Defaults (public endpoints) unless user requests VNet injection

auditLogging.scope: All AzureML training jobs and Storage account access
auditLogging.diagnosticSettings: Enable diagnostics + send to Log Analytics and storage containers

encryptionOfOutputs.approach: Use ADLSv2 or encrypted blob containers encrypted with CMK in Key Vault; configure AML to write outputs to encrypted storage

assumptions: Subscription has permissions to create Key Vault and assign CMK
nextSteps: Review and approve this plan (set meta.status to 'approved')
Choose IaC format: Bicep or Terraform
After approval, generate IaC under infra/ and proceed to deployment
